queries.question: Give me the law firms and the corresponding legal positions.
queries.sql: select law_firms.name , legal_positions.position_name from Law_Firms_Legal_Positions join Legal_Positions on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id = Legal_Positions.id join Law_Firms on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id = Law_Firms.id
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/jobpostings/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?name ?position_name WHERE {
  ?law_firms_legal_positions a :Law_Firms_Legal_Positions .
  ?legal_positions a :Legal_Positions .
  ?law_firms_legal_positions p:hasLegal_Positions ?legal_positions .
  ?law_firms a :Law_Firms .
  ?law_firms_legal_positions p:hasLaw_Firms ?law_firms .
  ?law_firms p:name ?name .
  ?legal_positions p:position_name ?position_name .
}

queries.question: What is the required experience of positions all law firms have in common?
queries.sql: SELECT Legal_Positions.required_experience  from Law_Firms_Legal_Positions join Legal_Positions on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id = Legal_Positions.id join Law_Firms on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id = Law_Firms.id   GROUP BY Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Law_Firms)

queries.question: What legal positions do we have for each law firm?
queries.sql: SELECT Legal_Positions.position_name  from Law_Firms_Legal_Positions join Legal_Positions on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id = Legal_Positions.id join Law_Firms on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id = Law_Firms.id   GROUP BY Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Law_Firms)

queries.question: What are the legal position names and required experiences for each law firm?
queries.sql: SELECT Legal_Positions.position_name, Legal_Positions.required_experience  from Law_Firms_Legal_Positions join Legal_Positions on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id = Legal_Positions.id join Law_Firms on Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id = Law_Firms.id   GROUP BY Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.position_id HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT Law_Firms_Legal_Positions.firm_id) = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM  Law_Firms)

queries.question: What are the legal position names and required experiences for each law firm?
